commands.help: Activate a token privilege on the current process or thread
commands.long_help: Enables the specified privilege on the current process token via AdjustTokenPrivileges. Prefix the privilege name with ~ to apply to the current thread token instead (useful for modifying an impersonated token).

arguments.name: privilege
arguments.desc: Privilege name to enable (e.g., SeDebugPrivilege). Prefix with ~ to apply to thread token instead of process token
